title: A pivot unit, a coupling element and a vehicle
abstract: A pivot unit comprises a first pivot part and a second pivot part which are coupled to each other and rotatable with respect to each other about a pivot axis, and at least two elongated springs, which are coupled to the first pivot part at respective first coupling locations and to the second pivot part at respective second coupling locations. The springs extend along the first and second pivot parts in transverse direction of the pivot axis at opposite sides of the pivot axis. The first coupling locations are provided at a separate first coupling element which is mounted to the first pivot part and the second coupling locations are provided at a separate second coupling element which is mounted to the second pivot part.
claims:
Claims 1. A pivot unit (1), comprising a first pivot part (5) and a second pivot part (6) which are coupled to each other and rotatable with respect to each other about a pivot axis (A), and at least two elongated springs (9), which are coupled to the first pivot part (5) at respective first coupling locations and to the second pivot part (6) at respective second coupling locations and which springs extend along the first and second pivot parts (5, 6) in transverse direction of the pivot axis (A) at opposite sides of the pivot axis (A) , wherein the first coupling locations are provided at a separate first coupling element (13) which is mounted to the first pivot part (5) and the second coupling locations are provided at a separate second coupling element (14) which is mounted to the second pivot part (6) . 2. A pivot unit (1) according to claim 1, wherein the first coupling element (13) and the second coupling element (14) are identical. 3. A pivot unit (1) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the pivot unit (1) has at least two pairs of elongated springs (9), each pair extending at each of said opposite sides of the pivot axis (A) and extending in transverse direction of the pivot axis (A) , and wherein the first and second coupling elements (13, 14) each have at least four first and second coupling locations (13, 14), respectively, at which the respective springs (9) are coupled. 4. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the first and second coupling elements (13, 14) and the first and second pivot parts (5, 6) are shaped such that the first coupling element (13) fits to the first pivot part (5) and the second coupling element (14) fits to the second pivot part (6) such that they are locked 

with respect to each other in rotational direction about an axis extending transversely to the pivot axis (A) . 5. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the first pivot part (5) is provided with at least two lateral projections (8) located at opposite sides thereof and directed in transverse direction of the pivot axis (A), wherein the pivot unit (1) has a rest condition in which the springs (9) extend between the respective first and second coupling locations along the respective projections (8) and a loaded condition in which the first pivot part (5) and the second pivot part (6) are rotated with respect to each other about the pivot axis (A) away from the rest condition, hence stretching one of the springs (9), and in which loaded condition the stretched spring (9) contacts the corresponding projection (8) . 6. A pivot unit (1) according to claim 5, wherein each of the projections (8) extends beyond the first and second coupling locations of the corresponding spring (9) in transverse direction of both the pivot axis (A) and the spring (9) when the pivot unit (1) is in its rest condition. 7. A pivot unit (1) according to claim 5 or 6, wherein end portions of the respective projections (8) are curved . 8. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the springs are elastic bands (9), for example made of rubber. 9. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the springs (9) are releasably mounted to the first coupling element (13) and the second coupling element (14) at the first and second coupling locations, respectively. 10. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein each end portion of the springs (9) 

comprises an eye (10) which fits about lateral ears (11) at the first and second coupling locations. 11. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the pivot unit (1) has identical end portions (15) remote from the pivot axis (A) . 12. A pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the springs (9) are adapted such that when the first and second pivot parts (5, 6) are rotated with respect to each other about the pivot axis (A) , one spring (9) is stretched whereas the other spring at opposite side of the pivot axis (A) is compressed. 13. A coupling element (13, 14) to be used as the first or second coupling element of a pivot unit (1) according to one of the preceding claims, which coupling element (13, 14) comprises T-shaped ears (11, 12) at opposite sides thereof and which coupling element (13, 14) is made of one piece. 14. A coupling element (13, 14) according to claim 13, wherein each of said opposite sides comprises a row of T- shaped ears (11, 12) . 15. A vehicle, which is provided with a pivot unit (1) according to one of the claims 1-12. 16. A vehicle according to claim 15, which comprises a front frame including a front wheel and a rear frame including a rear wheel, wherein the front frame and the rear frame are interconnected through the pivot unit (1) .
